name: wxcode-admin-quartz-lms
title: Quartz LMS Admin
description: Friendly-academic LMS administration dashboard — purple accent, left sidebar with school/program switcher, topbar with term selector, 4 KPI tiles (active students, courses, completion rate, avg score), enrollment/completion chart, courses table with progress bars, and upcoming assignments panel.

query.en: Build me a friendly academic LMS admin dashboard — left sidebar with school switcher, topbar with term selector, 4 KPI tiles (active students, courses, completion rate, avg score), enrollment/completion chart, courses table, and upcoming assignments panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a friendly academic LMS admin dashboard — left sidebar with school switcher, topbar with term selector, 4 KPI tiles (active students, courses, completion rate, avg score), enrollment/completion chart, courses table, and upcoming assignments panel.

provenance.note: category design-language reference only; original implementation
